title: Actions & Extras
description: Actions & Extras is well-optimized modpack inspired by the Actions & Stuff modpack from Bedrock Edition. It enhances Minecraft with smooth, expressive actions and extra quality-of-life features, all while preserving the familiar vanilla look and feel.
body:
> **Actions & Extras** has some mods inspired by **Actions & Stuff** from Minecraft bedrock edition for example:
1. **Punchy** – (item-holding animations)
2. **Fresh Animations** – (mob animations)
3. **Detailed Animations** – (eating, drinking, attacking, interacting)
4. **Enchantment Outlines** – (enchanted glow)
5. **Explosive Enhancement** – (enhanced explosions)
6. **Wakes** – (water trails)
7. **Particulate💦** – (action particles)

> **+ Optimization Mods** – (better performance, smoother gameplay, reduced lag)
